title: PWGood/Adventure Mod
description: Its  short advenrure mod about Russian Minecraft streamer - PWGood.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RXzo-R60x98" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


![RELEASE 1.1!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/837c7ce06df71801b9c624bd349ae7fa221a46bb.png)


**PWGood** - is a Russian Twitch streamer and Youtuber. He plays Minecraft and also has his server - PepeLand (Pepe the frog meme). PWGood also member of private Minecraft server - Mineshield.

This mod is an adventure in the role of PWGood.

**This mod includes:** 
- New weapons
- new armor
- new dimension
- new boss
- new achievements
- and much more

I wish you a pleasant game!

P.s: This is my first mod, so sorry for the mistakes and shortcomings (The release was made in 4 days)

(The 3D skin was taken from another mod, here is a link to it.:https://modrinth.com/mod/pwgood-fanmod)
